offer: For construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month, inconsistent reporting causes project delays. We automate reporting instead of manual reporting through spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent reporting leads to project delays and miscommunication.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to construction project managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among project managers
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation and data visualization tools on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
